description: Cal is brought to the Playground as a supposed 'peace offering.' Coulson and Simmons grow wary, with Simmons analyzing substances Cal took, suspecting a trojan horse strategy. May and Coulson confirm Skye's decision to side with her mother, making the S.H.I.E.L.D. team increasingly anxious about Cal and Jiaying's secrets.

transcript.line: You want to tell me what you're really doing here?
Sure. I'm a present, a gift horse, a peace offering from my family. I'm also an excellent Shanghai rummy partner.
Sir, I'm worried he's more of a trojan horse. I believe Cal took these before he was handed over to us. I'm going to analyze them in the lab.
We didn't lose Skye. She chose.
